question: Which SCF round is currently open for submissions and when does it close?

golden.answer:
A grounded answer derives its named examples and status claims from the live Stellar Scout directory or research data, then dates the roster so it is not presented as permanent. As of 2026-07-11, the live RFP response identified SCF #45 in Submission, with submissions open until 2026-08-16, and SCF #43 as the last concluded round.

The dated example is illustrative: a later grounded answer should report what the same source basis supports at its own observation time while preserving the stable distinctions above.
keyFacts: Presents specific source-supported content as a current or dated observation rather than as an unsupported memory claim.
Makes the as-of date visible for every changeable roster, status, version, or measurement.
Identifies the current SCF round and phase.
States the relevant current deadline or last-concluded-round distinction.
avoid: Do NOT substitute #44 or #43, invent a deadline time/timezone, give only a dashboard pointer, or freeze #45/August 16 as permanent.
Do NOT present the observed live result set as a complete or permanent roster; explicitly historical facts remain historical.
golden.notes:
GT-23 2026-07-10: require an actual dated round/phase/deadline answer plus live-source pointer. Distinguish #45 Submission, #44 distribution, and #43 concluded; examples remain non-gating and no deadline time/timezone is inferred.
GT-23 CORRECTION 2026-07-10: phase semantics and an answer-visible dated exemplar replace the abstract pointer-only template.

corroboration.claim: As of 2026-07-10 SCF #45 is in Submission with an August 16 deadline, while #44 is distributing awards and #43 is last concluded.
